snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:

Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryвАЩs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines wonвАЩt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. snippet.title: Jimmy Kimmel on Meghan & HarryвАЩs Shocking Interview with Oprah
snippet.description:
Oprah made her TV return with Meghan and Harry in a riveting two hour interview about drama with the Royal Family, the reaction from the UK was fierce, the Senate passed President BidenвАЩs $1.9 trillion COVID relief package, the CDC announced that those who have been fully vaccinated can gather indoors with smaller groups, Donald Trump doesnвАЩt want the RNC and Republican committees using his name and likeness to raise money, Pope Francis visited the top ShiвАЩite Cleric of Iraq to send a message of peace between the Catholic and Muslim worlds, it was fantasy suite night on вАЬThe BachelorвАЭ and love was in the air, and Jimmy chats with the editor of the conservative blog вАЬThe Daily RageвАЭ who is leading a protest against Space JamвАЩs new depiction of Lola Bunny.

SUBSCRIBE to get the latest #Kimmel: http://bit.ly/JKLSubscribe

Jimmy Kimmel serves as host and executive producer of Emmy¬Ѓ-nominated вАЬJimmy Kimmel Live!,вАЭ ABCвАЩs late-night talk show. вАЬJimmy Kimmel Live!вАЭ is well known for its huge viral video successes, with over 11 billion views and more than 15 million subscribers on the showвАЩs YouTube channel. Some of KimmelвАЩs most popular comedy bits include вАЬCelebrities Read Mean Tweets,вАЭ вАЬLie Witness News,вАЭ вАЬUnnecessary Censorship,вАЭ вАЬHalloween Candy YouTube Challenge,вАЭ and music videos like вАЬI (Wanna) Channing All Over Your Tatum.вАЭ

snippet.title: The Harry-Meghan-Oprah Interview Is All the Buzz
snippet.description:
James Corden kicks off the show recapping Oprah Winfey's interview with Prince Harry and Meghan, and James realizes the "wedding" he attended wasn't very official at all. And James gives us a handsy tutorial on how to milk a cow. After, Reggie Watts attempts to explain NFT art to James, who cannot pronounce "indistinguishable."

snippet.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle speak out
snippet.description:
In their first wide-ranging interview since leaving the royal family, Prince Harry and Meghan, Duchess of Sussex discuss that decision, plus bouts of depression, racism, family infighting and much more with Oprah Winfrey. Gayle King reports. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

It's Monday 8 March 2021. Our top stories this morning 0:00

The Duke and Duchess of Sussex's much-anticipated interview with Oprah Winfrey has aired in the US - with the couple sharing their side of the story about life in the Royal Family.

The couple spoke about their relationships with other royals, racism and how their mental health suffered.

Meghan spoke with Oprah for most of the interview, before being joined by Prince Harry.

Get the full story рЯСЙ http://bbc.in/3rqBdH3

After the teasing clips, the full interview between the Duke and Duchess of Sussex and Oprah Winfrey was shown last night in the US. Oprah with Meghan and Harry: A Primetime Special, is produced by Harpo Productions

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: What Kate Middleton Said At Her Post-Oprah Public Appearance
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan Markle's bombshell interview with Oprah Winfrey made headlines around the world and sent shockwaves through the royal family. There were some happy moments in the prime-time special. Prince Harry, for example, confirmed their soon-to-be second child's sex. 

When Oprah asked Harry how he felt about having a second child, he told her,

"Amazing. Just grateful. To have any child, any one or two, would be amazing. But to have a boy and then a girl, what more could you ask for? Now weвАЩve got our family, the four of us and our two dogs. ItвАЩs great."

But there were also some heavy moments, like when Markle revealed the true extent of her mental health struggles, and shared that someone in the royal family was "concerned" about her son Archie's skin color.

Among many other revelations, Markle also debunked a tabloid report that suggested she had made her sister-in-law Kate Middleton cry in the days leading up to her 2018 wedding. 

However, speaking to Winfrey during the interview, Markle revealed that Kate was actually the one who made her cry. Markle described the palace's response to misleading tabloid reports as the start of a "character assassination" and a "turning point" in her time spent as a senior member of the British royal family.

The Duchess of Sussex went on to clarify that, although Middleton did later apologize in private with a bouquet of flowers, the media's portrayal of what occurred between the two was difficult to bear. 

Middleton has yet to respond to Harry and Meghan's CBS sit-down. The Duchess of Cambridge and her husband have been active on social media since the interview, but only to post a picture of the Queen, in celebration of Commonwealth Day. However, Middleton made her first public appearance a mere 24 hours after the interview aired.

In a clip posted on the royal family's official YouTube channel, Middleton spoke via video call to the youngest woman to row solo across the Atlantic Ocean, Jasmine Harrison. 

The Duchess' conversation with the 21-year-old was held in celebration of International Women's Day, and throughout the video, the pair discussed Harrison's record-breaking 3,000-mile trip across the Atlantic.

During the video call, Kate appeared emotionally unfazed by Meghan's bombshell interview. But as Harry pointed out to Oprah, that's par for the course. 

When Meghan told Oprah her version of events surrounding the highly-publicized pre-wedding incident, she speculated that Kate would have corrected the story if she could have. 

If so, Kate may never speak, in public, at all about Meghan's story. But Buckingham Palace, on behalf of the queen, has released a statement that might well speak for her. The statement read, in part,

"The issues raised, particularly that of race, are concerning. While some recollections may vary, they are taken very seriously and will be addressed by the family privately."

When Entertainment Tonight spoke to royal expert, Katie Nicholl , she had her own theory about why the Duchess of Sussex would be upset about the interview. Nicholl told ET,

"Behind the scenes [Kate] has tried really hard to be a peacemaker between William and Harry. She has been deeply saddened by the brothers' falling out. Don't forget she was incredibly close to Harry herself." 

Meanwhile, Page Six interpreted Middleton's accessory selection for her International Women's day video call as a sign that "there's no bad blood" between Kate and Meghan. According to the gossip column, the Duchess of Cambridge put on a pair of Missoma earrings featuring, according to the jeweler's website, "pink heart-based healing crystals." Meghan just happens to also own several pieces from the same brand. Let the healing begin?

#MeghanMarkle #PrinceHarry #KateMiddleton

Read Full Article:  https://www.thelist.com/351033/what-kate-middleton-said-at-her-first-public-appearance-since-the-oprah-interview/

"Behind the scenes [Kate] has tried really hard to be a peacemaker between William and Harry. She has been deeply saddened by the brothers' falling out. Don't forget she was incredibly close to Harry herself." 

Meanwhile, Page Six interpreted Middleton's accessory selection for her International Women's day video call as a sign that "there's no bad blood" between Kate and Meghan. According to the gossip column, the Duchess of Cambridge put on a pair of Missoma earrings featuring, according to the jeweler's website, "pink heart-based healing crystals." Meghan just happens to also own several pieces from the same brand. Let the healing begin?

#MeghanMarkle #PrinceHarry #KateMiddleton

snippet.title: Aprilia Manganang, Tentara Wanita Berubah jadi Pria - iNews Sore 09/03
snippet.description:
Tanggal Tayang: 09/03/2021

Nama mantan pevoli putri Indonesia yang juga anggotaTNI, Aprilia Manganang, sedang menjadi sorotan. Baru-baru ini diketahui jika dirinya adalah seorang laki-laki. Hal itu diungkapkan langsung Kepala Staf Angkatan Darat (KSAD), Jenderal TNI Andika Perkasa. Dia menegaskan jika Sersan Dua (Serda) Aprilia Manganang berjenis kelamin laki-laki.

Jenderal TNI Andika Perkasa menyatakan Aprilia menderita hipospadias sedari lahir. Adanya kendala ekonomi, membuat Aprilia tidak bisa menangani kondisinya dan menerima keadaan yang ada. Akhirnya Aprilia dianggap perempuan, termasuk urusan administrasi kependudukan.

вАЬAnak ini termasuk dalam kasus Hipospadias serius sehingga paramedis, yang membantu kelahirannya, dan orang tua menilai secara fisik, bahwa dia perempuan,вАЭ kata Jenderal TNI Andika Perkasa.

вАЬDari pemeriksaan urologi, Sersan Manganang lebih memiliki organ-organ jenis kelamin laki-laki, bahkan tidak ada organ-organ internal jenis kelamin perempuan,вАЭ tegasnya.

Lalu bagaimana perjalanan kariernya di dunia voli? Aprilia sendiri memiliki prestasi yang sangat gemilang di olahraga voli, mulai dari kancah nasional dan internasional.



Program berita harian yang menyajikan Informasi tercepat dan teraktual secara detail dari berbagai bidang secara LIVE, mulai dari peristiwa politik, hukum, sosial, budaya, ekonomi, dan olah raga, baik dari dalam ataupun luar negeri. snippet.description:
Ah Jie Zoe Tay is the very first female artiste to receive the All-Time Favourite Artiste Award. What are some interesting moments during her Star Search days? This episode welcomes her two confidants of 30 years, a veteran colleague she has collaborated with several times, the last guest turns out... 

йШњеІРйГСжГ†зОЙпЉМжШѓй¶ЦдљНиОЈйҐБиґЕзЇІзЇҐжШЯзЪДе•≥иЙЇдЇЇгАВе•єељУеєіеПВеК†гАКжЙНеНОж®™жЇҐеЗЇжЦ∞зІАгАЛеПСзФЯињЗдїАдєИиґ£дЇЛпЉЯе•єжЬЙењГдЇЛжЧґпЉМдЉЪжЙЊи∞БеАЊиѓЙпЉЯе•єжЬЙжЉФдЄНдЇЖзЪДиІТиЙ≤еРЧпЉЯдїКе§©еПЧйВАзЪДз•ЮзІШеШЙеЃЊпЉМдЄОе•єеЕ≥з≥їеѓЖеИЗпЉЪдЄ§дљНжШѓе•єзЫЄиѓЖ30еєізЪДйЧЇиЬЬе•љеПЛпЉМдЄАдљНжШѓеРИдљЬе§Ъжђ°зЪДиµДжЈ±зФµиІЖдЇЇпЉМињШжЬЙдЄАдљНжШѓвА¶ иѓЈйФБеЃЪгАКз•ЮзІШеШЙеЃЊгАЛпЉМдЄАиµЈжОҐзіҐйШњеІРзЪДеЖЕењГдЄЦзХМпЉБ

#TheInnerCircle #з•ЮзІШеШЙеЃЊ

#Karnan Tamil Movie:

Lyrics animated by - SFTS MEDIA

Lyrics:

Not fathered by the Sun God; 
Nor witnessed by the Moon God; 
Born to a forsaken woman, this child - 
Fed and raised on famine, this child...

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

There's the big old Banyan Tree;
Perched upon its tallest branch, 
Though it is all alone -
The lone parakeet sings his name!

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

All these countless temples in the village, 
All these countless Gods in the temple, 
And not a single idol of Karnan - 
But he's part of our family! 

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

Never laid eyes on any armour (Kavacham);
Never adorned with any ornaments (Kundalam), either;
Would you look how he wields the sword! 
None of his foes survived.

(Chorus)
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!
Have you seen Karnan? Do tell him to come! 
Oh, fetch Karnan right away!

еС®дЄЙжЩЪпЉИ10жЧ•пЉЙиЈСй¶ђеЬ∞й¶ђе†ідЄКжЉФдєЭе†іи≥љдЇЛпЉМй†≠е†іеЃЪжЦЉеВНжЩЪ6жЩВ45еИЖйЦЛиЈСгАВ

иШЛжЮЬгАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛе±ЖжЩВзЫіжТ≠еРДе†іи≥љдЇЛпЉМиЃУй¶ђињЈзМґе¶ВзљЃиЇЂе†іеЕІзЭЗиЈСй¶ђгАВ

ињСеЕ©жђ°и≥љдЇЛиОЂйЫЈжЛЙеБЬи≥љпЉМеЃњжХµжљШй†Уи±™е•™8WпЉМдїКжђ°йЫЈз•ЮеЉЈеЛҐеЊ©еЗЇй®Оиґ≥дєЭе†іпЉМеМєеМєйГљдњВеѓ¶еКЫй¶ђпЉМе∞§еЕґзЈій¶ђеЄЂжЦєеШЙжЯПзВЇдїЦжПРдЊЫдЇФйІТпЉМй®ОзЈіжЬЙжЬЫйА£е†іжХЄз≥КгАВ

дЄїжМБжЬГеИЖжЮРж≠§иЈѓдЇЇй¶ђеРДйІТж©ЯжЬГпЉМйЕНеРИеРДе†ій¶ђеМєи≥љзЄЊгАБйЂФйЗНиЃКеМЦгАБдЇЇй¶ђеРИдљЬз≠Йзµ±и®Ии≥ЗжЦЩпЉМдЄАи°®зЭЗжЩТпЉМжЦєдЊњеИ®й¶ђгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛдїКе≠£жЦ∞еҐЮAIж®°жУђи≥љжЮЬпЉМйЫЖеРДй†ЕdataйА≤и°МйБЛзЃЧпЉМи≠ШеИ•еЗЇеУ™дЇЫжШѓж©ЯжЬГй¶ђпЉМдї•еЊЧеИЖйЂШдљОжОТеЇПпЉМдЄАзЫЃдЇЖзДґпЉБ

дЄїжМБдЇ¶жЬГеН≥е†іиІ£з≠ФиЃАиАЕзХЩи®АпЉМиИЗиЃАиАЕдЇТеЛХдЇ§жµБпЉЫеП¶е§ЦжЬГеК†жПТй®ОзЈіи≥љеЙНи®™еХПпЉМе§ІеЃґжИЦиАЕеЊЮдЄ≠еПѓдї•жРµеИ∞жЦєеРСгАВ

ж≠§е§ЦпЉМдї≤жЬГжЦ∞еҐЮеЗЇйЦШй†РжЄђиµ∞дљНеЬЦпЉМз≠ЙиІАзЬЊдЇЖиІ£дїКе†іи≥љдЇЛељҐеЛҐпЉМйВКеХ≤й¶ђеПѓдї•и≥Їж≠•йАЯпЉЫйВКеХ≤й¶ђзЫЄе∞НиЭХеЇХпЉМеЛЩж±ВеєЂе§ІеЃґжНЙжЫіе§ЪеЖЈй¶ђгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛжЦ∞еҐЮеПГи≥љй¶ђи≥†зОЗиµ∞еЛҐпЉМзФ±йЪФжЩЪеИ∞еН≥е†іпЉМдЄАзЫЃдЇЖзДґпЉЫйЫїиЕ¶й†Ри®ИиЗ®е†іе§ІжИґиРљй£Ый¶ђпЉМиЃУй¶ђињЈиРљж≥®еЙНдљЬеПГиАГпЉМеҐЮжЈїеЛЭзЃЧгАВ

zh-HK.title: и≥љй¶ђзЫіжТ≠пљЬ2021-03-10 LiveзЫіжТ≠9е†іHKJCй¶ЩжЄѓи≥љй¶ђжЬГењЂжіїи∞ЈиНЙеЬ∞е§Ьй¶ђ еН≥е†іи≤Ље£Ђ AIж®°жУђи≥љжЮЬ жОТйЪКй¶ђ | зЂґй¶ђFact Check | иШЛжЮЬжЧ•е†± Apple Daily
zh-HK.description:
еС®дЄЙжЩЪпЉИ10жЧ•пЉЙиЈСй¶ђеЬ∞й¶ђе†ідЄКжЉФдєЭе†іи≥љдЇЛпЉМй†≠е†іеЃЪжЦЉеВНжЩЪ6жЩВ45еИЖйЦЛиЈСгАВ

иШЛжЮЬгАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛе±ЖжЩВзЫіжТ≠еРДе†іи≥љдЇЛпЉМиЃУй¶ђињЈзМґе¶ВзљЃиЇЂе†іеЕІзЭЗиЈСй¶ђгАВ

ињСеЕ©жђ°и≥љдЇЛиОЂйЫЈжЛЙеБЬи≥љпЉМеЃњжХµжљШй†Уи±™е•™8WпЉМдїКжђ°йЫЈз•ЮеЉЈеЛҐеЊ©еЗЇй®Оиґ≥дєЭе†іпЉМеМєеМєйГљдњВеѓ¶еКЫй¶ђпЉМе∞§еЕґзЈій¶ђеЄЂжЦєеШЙжЯПзВЇдїЦжПРдЊЫдЇФйІТпЉМй®ОзЈіжЬЙжЬЫйА£е†іжХЄз≥КгАВ

дЄїжМБжЬГеИЖжЮРж≠§иЈѓдЇЇй¶ђеРДйІТж©ЯжЬГпЉМйЕНеРИеРДе†ій¶ђеМєи≥љзЄЊгАБйЂФйЗНиЃКеМЦгАБдЇЇй¶ђеРИдљЬз≠Йзµ±и®Ии≥ЗжЦЩпЉМдЄАи°®зЭЗжЩТпЉМжЦєдЊњеИ®й¶ђгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛдїКе≠£жЦ∞еҐЮAIж®°жУђи≥љжЮЬпЉМйЫЖеРДй†ЕdataйА≤и°МйБЛзЃЧпЉМи≠ШеИ•еЗЇеУ™дЇЫжШѓж©ЯжЬГй¶ђпЉМдї•еЊЧеИЖйЂШдљОжОТеЇПпЉМдЄАзЫЃдЇЖзДґпЉБ

дЄїжМБдЇ¶жЬГеН≥е†іиІ£з≠ФиЃАиАЕзХЩи®АпЉМиИЗиЃАиАЕдЇТеЛХдЇ§жµБпЉЫеП¶е§ЦжЬГеК†жПТй®ОзЈіи≥љеЙНи®™еХПпЉМе§ІеЃґжИЦиАЕеЊЮдЄ≠еПѓдї•жРµеИ∞жЦєеРСгАВ

ж≠§е§ЦпЉМдї≤жЬГжЦ∞еҐЮеЗЇйЦШй†РжЄђиµ∞дљНеЬЦпЉМз≠ЙиІАзЬЊдЇЖиІ£дїКе†іи≥љдЇЛељҐеЛҐпЉМйВКеХ≤й¶ђеПѓдї•и≥Їж≠•йАЯпЉЫйВКеХ≤й¶ђзЫЄе∞НиЭХеЇХпЉМеЛЩж±ВеєЂе§ІеЃґжНЙжЫіе§ЪеЖЈй¶ђгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛжЦ∞еҐЮеПГи≥љй¶ђи≥†зОЗиµ∞еЛҐпЉМзФ±йЪФжЩЪеИ∞еН≥е†іпЉМдЄАзЫЃдЇЖзДґпЉЫйЫїиЕ¶й†Ри®ИиЗ®е†іе§ІжИґиРљй£Ый¶ђпЉМиЃУй¶ђињЈиРљж≥®еЙНдљЬеПГиАГпЉМеҐЮжЈїеЛЭзЃЧгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛе∞ЗжЦЉеВНжЩЪ6жЩВ10еИЖйЦЛжТ≠пЉМе±ЖжЩВYoutubeеПКгАКжЮЬзЗГеП∞гАЛжЬГеЕ®з®ЛзЫіжТ≠гАВ

Lionel Messi scored a superb long-range effort and had a penalty saved as PSG held off his spirited Barcelona side to reach the quarter-finals of the Champions League with a 5-2 aggregate win.

snippet.title: Juventus 3-2 FC Porto | Champions League 20/21 Match Highlights
snippet.description:
Juventus 3-2 FC Porto | Champions League 20/21 Match Highlights

10-men FC Porto edged past Juventus to reach the Champions League quarter-finals. Despite a 3-2 defeat after extra time at the Allianz Arena, the away goals rule saw them triumph with a 4-4 aggregate scoreline.

#arsenal #arsenalhighlights #premierleague

---

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Mesut Ozil, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

Arsenal Football Club were formed in 1886 and amassed 13 League titles, 14 FA Cups. Some of their greatest players include: Thierry Henry, Dennis Bergkamp, Tony Adams, Ian Wright, Robert Pires, Liam Brady, Patrick Vieira, Cliff Bastin and Charlie George.

snippet.title: Persembahan: Amyza Aznan & Adrian - Ku Bersuara | Famili Duo (2021)
snippet.description:
Minggu keempat membawa ibu bapa dan anak ke pentas Famili Duo untuk menghiburkan penonton. Lima pasangan yang diketengahkan adalah Liza Abdullah & Naffiz Zolkefli, Amelina & Puteri, Shajiry & Hafiz, Amyza Aznan & Adrian dan Fauzi Nawawi & Fareez Fauzi. Nyanyian mereka akan diadili panel juri yang terdiri daripada Mark Adam dan Didie Alias.

Saksikan Famili Duo di TV3 setiap Ahad jam 9 malam. Anda juga boleh strim langsung di saluran YouTube TV3Malaysia.

Famili Duo merupakan rancangan hiburan terbaharu TV3. Seramai 40 pasangan selebriti popular tanahair akan bergandingan dengan ahli keluarga mereka untuk menonjolkan bakat nyanyian masing-masing.

Setiap minggu, 5 pasangan selebriti popular yang mempunyai hubungan kekeluargaan akan bertanding. Mereka perlu melengkapkan 2 pusingan iaitu satu 'cover song' dan satu nyanyian di pentas. Untuk pusingan pertama, ahli keluarga yang lebih berumur akan menentukan вАШcover songвАЩ untuk dihasilkan menjadi video muzik. Lagu tersebut akan diberi nafas baharu dan dirakamkan di studio. Di pusingan kedua, ahli keluarga yang lebih muda berpeluang memilih lagu untuk dipersembahkan di atas pentas.

Pemarkahan ditentukan sepenuhnya oleh juri dan juara mingguan bakal membawa pulang hadiah wang tunai. Famili Duo dihoskan oleh Uyaina Arshad.

snippet.title: My Star Bride ињЗж±ЯжЦ∞е®Ш EP20 (FINALE е§ІзїУе±А)
snippet.description:
Fang Cao worries about her mother's hospitalisation and decides to return to Vietnam to take care of her. Shi Jie buys a plane ticket for her leaving in two days. His condition relapses so he is hospitalised, worrying her. She confesses to him in front of his sickbed. Not wanting to burden her, he rejects her and asks her to sign the divorce papers to cut all ties with her. Fang Cao leaves sadly.

snippet.title: 'I was prepared to die': Nun protects protesters in Myanmar's 'Tiananmen moment'
snippet.description:
In what's being described as Myanmar's 'Tiananmen moment', Sky speaks to a nun who stopped soldiers from attacking anti-coup protesters.

Dozens of demonstrators have been killed during a brutal crackdown by the military in Myanmar.

Sky's Southeast Asia correspondent Siobhan Robbins reports.

snippet.title: и≥љй¶ђзЫіжТ≠пљЬ2021-03-07 зЂґй¶ђFact Check LiveзЫіжТ≠10е†іHKJCй¶ЩжЄѓи≥љй¶ђжЬГж≤ЩзФ∞ж≥•иНЙжЧ•й¶ђ еН≥е†іи≤Ље£Ђ AIж®°жУђи≥љжЮЬ жОТйЪКй¶ђ | иШЛжЮЬжЧ•е†± Apple Daily
snippet.description:
жШѓжЧ•пЉИ7жЧ•пЉЙж≤ЩзФ∞й¶ђе†ідЄКжЉФеНБе†іж≥•иНЙи≥љдЇЛпЉМй†≠е†іеЃЪжЦЉдЄЛеНИ1жЩВж≠£йЦЛиЈСгАВ

иШЛжЮЬгАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛе±ЖжЩВзЫіжТ≠еРДе†іи≥љдЇЛпЉМиЃУй¶ђињЈзМґе¶ВзљЃиЇЂе†іеЕІзЭЗиЈСй¶ђгАВ

иФ°зіДзњ∞зФ∞жИ∞ж≠£еАЉеНБйА£еЛЭжЧЇеЛҐпЉМеП¶е§ЦеЊТеЉЯзЊЕеѓМеЕ®дЇ¶еЈ≤йА£иіПеЫЫжЬЯзФ∞жИ∞пЉМдЇМдЇЇдїКжђ°зєЉзЇМжіЊеЗЇдЄНе∞Сеѓ¶еКЫй¶ђдЄКйЩ£пЉМжЬЙжђКеїґзЇМж≤ЩзФ∞еЛЭзЇЬгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛдїКе≠£жЦ∞еҐЮAIж®°жУђи≥љжЮЬпЉМйЫЖеРДй†ЕdataйА≤и°МйБЛзЃЧпЉМи≠ШеИ•еЗЇеУ™дЇЫжШѓж©ЯжЬГй¶ђпЉМдї•еЊЧеИЖйЂШдљОжОТеЇПпЉМдЄАзЫЃдЇЖзДґпЉБ

дЄїжМБдЇ¶жЬГеН≥е†іиІ£з≠ФиЃАиАЕзХЩи®АпЉМиИЗиЃАиАЕдЇТеЛХдЇ§жµБпЉЫеП¶е§ЦжЬГеК†жПТй®ОзЈіи≥љеЙНи®™еХПпЉМе§ІеЃґжИЦиАЕеЊЮдЄ≠еПѓдї•жРµеИ∞жЦєеРСгАВ

ж≠§е§ЦпЉМе∞ЗжЬЙеЗЇйЦШй†РжЄђиµ∞дљНеЬЦпЉМз≠ЙиІАзЬЊдЇЖиІ£дїКе†іи≥љдЇЛељҐеЛҐпЉМйВКеХ≤й¶ђеПѓдї•и≥Їж≠•йАЯпЉЫйВКеХ≤й¶ђзЫЄе∞НиЭХеЇХпЉМеЛЩж±ВеєЂе§ІеЃґжНЙжЫіе§ЪеЖЈй¶ђгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛи®≠жЬЙеПГи≥љй¶ђи≥†зОЗиµ∞еЛҐпЉМзФ±йЪФжЩЪеИ∞еН≥е†іпЉМдЄАзЫЃдЇЖзДґпЉЫйЫїиЕ¶й†Ри®ИиЗ®е†іе§ІжИґиРљй£Ый¶ђпЉМиЃУй¶ђињЈиРљж≥®еЙНдљЬеПГиАГпЉМеҐЮжЈїеЛЭзЃЧгАВ

жШѓжЧ•пЉИ7жЧ•пЉЙж≤ЩзФ∞й¶ђе†ідЄКжЉФеНБе†іж≥•иНЙи≥љдЇЛпЉМй†≠е†іеЃЪжЦЉдЄЛеНИ1жЩВж≠£йЦЛиЈСгАВ

иШЛжЮЬгАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛе±ЖжЩВзЫіжТ≠еРДе†іи≥љдЇЛпЉМиЃУй¶ђињЈзМґе¶ВзљЃиЇЂе†іеЕІзЭЗиЈСй¶ђгАВ

иФ°зіДзњ∞зФ∞жИ∞ж≠£еАЉеНБйА£еЛЭжЧЇеЛҐпЉМеП¶е§ЦеЊТеЉЯзЊЕеѓМеЕ®дЇ¶еЈ≤йА£иіПеЫЫжЬЯзФ∞жИ∞пЉМдЇМдЇЇдїКжђ°зєЉзЇМжіЊеЗЇдЄНе∞Сеѓ¶еКЫй¶ђдЄКйЩ£пЉМжЬЙжђКеїґзЇМж≤ЩзФ∞еЛЭзЇЬгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛдїКе≠£жЦ∞еҐЮAIж®°жУђи≥љжЮЬпЉМйЫЖеРДй†ЕdataйА≤и°МйБЛзЃЧпЉМи≠ШеИ•еЗЇеУ™дЇЫжШѓж©ЯжЬГй¶ђпЉМдї•еЊЧеИЖйЂШдљОжОТеЇПпЉМдЄАзЫЃдЇЖзДґпЉБ

дЄїжМБдЇ¶жЬГеН≥е†іиІ£з≠ФиЃАиАЕзХЩи®АпЉМиИЗиЃАиАЕдЇТеЛХдЇ§жµБпЉЫеП¶е§ЦжЬГеК†жПТй®ОзЈіи≥љеЙНи®™еХПпЉМе§ІеЃґжИЦиАЕеЊЮдЄ≠еПѓдї•жРµеИ∞жЦєеРСгАВ

ж≠§е§ЦпЉМе∞ЗжЬЙеЗЇйЦШй†РжЄђиµ∞дљНеЬЦпЉМз≠ЙиІАзЬЊдЇЖиІ£дїКе†іи≥љдЇЛељҐеЛҐпЉМйВКеХ≤й¶ђеПѓдї•и≥Їж≠•йАЯпЉЫйВКеХ≤й¶ђзЫЄе∞НиЭХеЇХпЉМеЛЩж±ВеєЂе§ІеЃґжНЙжЫіе§ЪеЖЈй¶ђгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛи®≠жЬЙеПГи≥љй¶ђи≥†зОЗиµ∞еЛҐпЉМзФ±йЪФжЩЪеИ∞еН≥е†іпЉМдЄАзЫЃдЇЖзДґпЉЫйЫїиЕ¶й†Ри®ИиЗ®е†іе§ІжИґиРљй£Ый¶ђпЉМиЃУй¶ђињЈиРљж≥®еЙНдљЬеПГиАГпЉМеҐЮжЈїеЛЭзЃЧгАВ

гАКзЂґй¶ђFact CheckгАЛе∞ЗжЦЉдЄ≠еНИ12жЩВ25еИЖйЦЛжТ≠пЉМе±ЖжЩВYoutubeеПКгАКжЮЬзЗГеП∞гАЛжЬГеЕ®з®ЛзЫіжТ≠гАВ

snippet.title: Oprah Winfrey on her bombshell Harry and Meghan interview
snippet.description:
Oprah Winfrey joined "CBS This Morning" the day after her wide-ranging interview with Prince Harry and Meghan, Duchess of Sussex aired on CBS. Winfrey is reacting to some of the most explosive moments of the interview, and what she learned from the couple. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) вАУ our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceXвАЩs site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee вАУ approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipвАЩs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10вАЩs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceXвАЩs third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: Texas's power disaster is a warning sign for the US
snippet.description:
America's power grid is not ready.

Subscribe and turn on notifications (рЯФФ ) so you don't miss any videos: http://goo.gl/0bsAjO

In February, extreme cold and an unusual winter storm left millions of Texans in the dark. Many went without power or water, in subzero temperatures, for nearly five days. It was a disaster; dozens died. But even though that storm hit much of the country, the power outages were mostly limited to Texas. ThatвАЩs because Texas is on its own electrical grid, separate from the rest of the country, which means it canвАЩt easily get power from other states in an emergency.

But Texas's grid itself is not what failed. Power went out across Texas in the first place because energy sources across the state were unprepared for severe weather. And that didnвАЩt have to happen; Texas had been warned about this exact scenario, and had actually experienced versions of it twice in the last 30 years. But they didnвАЩt prepare.

Now the rest of the US faces the same issue. Climate change is making severe weather disasters more and more frequent. And the American energy system is not ready for it.

Read more about what happened in Texas and about the US electrical grid: https://www.vox.com/22289517/texas-storm-uri-weather-power-outage-snow

And check out more coverage of the Texas power crisis from the Texas Tribune: https://www.texastribune.org/2021/02/22/texas-power-grid-extreme-weather/

Vox.com is a news website that helps you cut through the noise and understand what's really driving the events in the headlines. Check out http://www.vox.com.

snippet.title: What will break the stalemate in Myanmar?  | Inside Story
snippet.description:
A month of protests against Myanmar's military coup shows no signs of letting up.
The army has begun firing live rounds at peaceful demonstrators.
The UN says scores of people have been killed since February 1.
Despite this, the protests are growing larger in many towns and cities.
With neither side backing down, can anything break the impasse?

snippet.description:
Demonstrators in MyanmarвАЩs biggest city came out Monday night for their first mass protests in defiance of an 8 pm curfew, seeking to show support for an estimated 200 students trapped by security forces in a small area of one neighbourhood.

#Myanmar #AntiCoupProtests #Curfew

snippet.title: PENGAKUAN Kaesang Pangarep soal Batal Nikahi Felicia Tissue, Ungkap Alasan Tak Umbar ke Publik
snippet.description:
TRIBUN-VIDEO.COM - Hubungan asmaranya empat menjadi perbincangan publik, Kaesang Pangarep akhirnya buka suara.

Kaesang disebut meninggalkan kekasihnya Felicia Tissue lantaran ada orang lain.

Kini Kaesang mengaku sudah memutuskan hubungan dengan Felicia sejak Januari 2021.

Ia menjelaskan, sebenarnya ia sudah berbicara kepada Felicia untuk mengakhiri hubungan asmaranya pada Januari lalu.

Bahkan saat mengutarakan maksud untuk mengakhiri hubungan, Kaesang menyebut sempat dimaki-maki.

Meski begitu, menurut Kaesang hubungan asmaranya merupakan masalah pribadi dan tidak etis untuk diumbar.

"Itu kan masalh pribadi toh, masalah pribadi ngapain toh diumbar umbar engga etis," kata Kaesang.

Sebelumnya, Putera Presiden Jokowi, Kaesang Pangarep tengah diterpa gosip hubungan asmara.

Dikutip dari video yang diterima oleh Tribunnews.com, Senin (8/3/2021), Kaesang disebut meninggalkan kekasihnya, Felicia Tissue, karena adanya wanita lain.

Bahkan ibunda  Felicia Tissue, Meilia Lau melalui akun instagramnya @meilia_lau mengungkapkan Kaesang yang berjanji akan menikahi anaknya.

Tulisan Meilia tersebut turut me-mention akun instagram Jokowi, @jokowi dan kemudian viral di jagat twitter.

Sementara itu, Tenaga Ahli Utama Kantor Staf Kepresidenan Ali Mochtar Ngabalin meminta hubungan Kaesang dan Felicia tak perlu menyeret orangtua.

"Inilah, jangan bawa-bawa orang-tua, jangan dipaksa-paksa," kata Ali.

Menurut Ali, hubungan asmara seorang anak, biar anaklah yang menentukan lantaran mereka yang menjalaninya.

Orangtua cukup mengarahkan, tanpa perlu ikut campur.

Terlebih bila mengaitkannya dengan presiden.

Meskipun Presiden tidak terganggu, namun menurutnya kurang elok bila membawa-bawa nama Presiden.

(Tribun-Video.com)
